content: You appear to be stuck on [Explore Nihal system. FIRST use scan_system to list all locations. THEN travel to each location one by one. At each location: look for NPCs and capture ALL dialog verbatim. Look for stations, anomalies, ARG triggers. Note what resources are available at asteroid belts and ice fields. If there is a station, dock at it and check the market for survey scanner. Report every detail — the texture of this system matters. Be methodical: scan, then visit location 1, then location 2, etc.] in phase active for 225 minutes. Assess your current situation and either continue or abandon and replan.
